key_metrics.system_stability: Overall system performance remains stable with minimal disruptions
key_metrics.resource_utilization: Efficient use of computational resources across all modules
key_metrics.learning_progress: Consistent improvement in task execution accuracy over time

main_risks: Potential degradation in system stability due to unforeseen external factors
Resource constraints may limit scalability in high-demand scenarios
Accuracy plateaus may hinder further performance gains
trends: Increasing demand for complex multi-task handling
Growing emphasis on real-time adaptability and responsiveness
Shift towards more collaborative and distributed processing architectures
